claim: The previous baseline run selected X1 as the first experiment: a run-local idea ledger.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Experiment backlog says X1 should run first, testing whether a minimal idea ledger improves continuity over prose-only 07_ideas.md.
notes: This justifies creating this follow-up run.

claim: The baseline idea list contains six candidate ideas and explicit rejected ideas.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: I1-I6 include idea ledger, debate_ideas.py, scorecard, pipeline report, change brief generator, and discussion import. Rejected ideas include vector DB clustering and UI dashboard.

claim: Provider health probe found four usable subscription routes for this project lab.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: claude-sonnet, claude-haiku, vibe-default, and agy-default returned ok.
notes: Provider availability enables independent extraction and critique.

claim: Claude Sonnet converted I1-I6 into CSV-like idea rows, but evidence references needed normalization.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Claude returned CSV rows for I1-I6 with title, premise, evidence_rows, status, next_test, and main_risk.
conflicts: Some evidence references did not align cleanly with this run ledger.
notes: Used as extraction draft, not accepted verbatim.

claim: Agy strict critic kept I1, kept I2, modified I3 into ledger columns, deferred I4 and I5, and stopped I6.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Agy recommended starting with a single CSV file that depends on evidence rows; it marked I1 KEEP, I2 KEEP, I3 MODIFY, I4 DEFER, I5 DEFER, and I6 STOP.
conflicts: Provider output is critique signal, not authoritative evidence.

claim: Vibe did not produce usable schema critique for this run.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: First attempt stopped at turn limit; retry emitted a tool read call rather than a schema critique.
conflicts: Vibe was healthy in doctor probe but not useful for this prompt.

claim: A separate scorecard may be overbuilt; score fields can be tested as ledger columns first.
evidence_quote_or_paraphrase: Agy said a separate scorecard artifact is overbuilding and suggested adding score_feasibility and score_impact columns directly to the idea ledger.
conflicts: This conflicts with the earlier idea of a separate scorecard.
notes: This run keeps a separate scorecard only as an experiment artifact.
